tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeCreateFhirDatastore.createFhirDatastore
tools.description: Creates a Data Store that can ingest and export FHIR formatted data.

tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeDescribeFhirDatastore.describeFhirDatastore
tools.description: Gets the properties associated with the FHIR Data Store, including the Data Store ID, Data Store ARN, Data Store name, Data Store status, created at, Data Store type version, and Data Store endpoint.

tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeDescribeFhirExportJob.describeFhirExportJob
tools.description: Displays the properties of a FHIR export job, including the ID, ARN, name, and the status of the job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeDescribeFhirImportJob.describeFhirImportJob
tools.description: Displays the properties of a FHIR import job, including the ID, ARN, name, and the status of the job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeListFhirDatastores.listFhirDatastores
tools.description: Lists all FHIR Data Stores that are in the user’s account, regardless of Data Store status.

tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeListFhirExportJobs.listFhirExportJobs
tools.description: Lists all FHIR export jobs associated with an account and their statuses.

tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeListFhirImportJobs.listFhirImportJobs
tools.description: Lists all FHIR import jobs associated with an account and their statuses.

tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Returns a list of all existing tags associated with a Data Store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeTagResource.tagResource
tools.description: Adds a user specifed key and value tag to a Data Store.

tools.name: xAmzTargetHealthLakeUntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Removes tags from a Data Store.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
